decision: Patch trace ingestion status inference so evidence packets are not marked ERROR because their prose contains words like failure; add regression fixtures and validator coverage.
root_cause: infer_status used substring matching against long prose in decision fields, so words such as failure triggered FAIL -> ERROR classification.
smallest_valid_fix: Replace substring matching with exact/prefix status parsing.
Treat compact decision values such as ALLOW or DENY as status; treat long CE prose as evidence text.
Default CE/SEE evidence packets to OK unless explicit failure fields or issue lists are present.
Add fixture-based regression tests for CE, SEE, DENY, FAIL, and issues/WARN behavior.
expected_outcome: derived_packet_missing_status_contract disappears from the failure cluster report and TRACE_INGESTION_CLASSIFIER_REPAIR is no longer routed as an active/monitor repair.
